tier.description: Priority tier based on total score: tier_1 (≥70), tier_2 (50–69), tier_3 (30–49), below_threshold (<30).

score_breakdown.description: Points awarded in each of the four scoring dimensions.

positive_signals.description: Explicit evidence-backed signals that increased the score.

negative_signals.description: Signals that reduced the score or indicate risk.

missing_data.description: Data points that were unavailable and how they affected scoring.

recommended_action.description: The specific next action a rep should take, tied to the tier assignment.

score_rationale.description: Plain-language explanation of the score a rep can read in under 30 seconds.
